examples: OBJECTIVE To analyze the causes and features of electronystagmography (ENG) in middle and elder aged vertigo patients.
AIM To investigate the change of electronystagmography (ENG) in sleep apnea syndrome (SAS) patients and its clinical significance.
With electronystagmography (ENG), various tests were carried out in 16 patients of congenital and 10 patients of acquired nystagmus.
